items.title: Bajaj Finserv Q3 Results: Revenue jumps 24% YoY to Rs 39,708 crore, PAT growth flat
items.description: Bajaj Finserv Q3 Results: Bajaj Finserv reported a flat consolidated net profit of Rs 2,229 crore for Q3FY26, while revenue rose 24% to Rs 39,708 crore. Interest income and insurance operations supported growth, even as emerging businesses posted losses. Bajaj Finance, Bajaj General and Bajaj Life all recorded healthy growth across lending, premiums and new business metrics.

items.title: Airtel Q3 Preview: Revenue may rise 18% YoY; ARPU seen inching up to Rs 258
items.description: Bharti Airtel is expected to deliver steady Q3 results, with brokerages forecasting up to 18% YoY revenue growth and a 35% jump in profit. ARPU expansion, strong home broadband momentum, and sustained gains in Airtel Africa are seen driving performance, while consolidated margins are likely to remain stable to slightly higher.

items.title: Trent Q3 Results: Cons PAT rises 3% YoY to Rs 513 crore, revenue jumps 15%
items.description: Trent Q3 Results: Trent reported a 3% rise in its December quarter consolidated net profit to Rs 513 crore, with revenue from operations up 15% to Rs 5,345 crore. On a standalone basis, PAT surged 36% to Rs 640 crore. The company expanded its store portfolio to over 1,100 large-box fashion stores across 274 cities.

items.title: Devyani International Q3 Results: Loss widens to Rs 109 crore, revenue up 11%
items.description: Devyani International Ltd announced a net loss of Rs 109.78 crore for the December quarter of FY26. This marks an increase from the previous year's loss. However, the company saw its revenue from operations rise by 11.31 percent. Its Biryani by Kilo business reached breakeven. Devyani International is a major franchisee for KFC and Pizza Hut in India.

items.title: Nykaa Q3 Results Preview: PAT may surge up to 192% YoY led by BPC momentum; revenue to rise up to 28%
items.description: Nykaa is poised for a strong performance in the December quarter. Robust festive demand and sustained momentum in its Beauty and Personal Care segment are expected to drive significant profit growth. Brokerage estimates project a substantial surge in net profit and revenue. The company is set to announce its earnings on Thursday, February 5.
